'/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/h/g/orchestrate/chl_page/v1?ray=86a716b9ec0558d2';window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash = location.hash === '' && location.href.indexOf('#') !== -1 ? '#' : location.hash;window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery = location.search === '' && location.href.slice(0, location.href.length - window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash.length).indexOf('?') !== -1 ? '?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null, "\/locations\/00001272.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=ey7uzOirGc8uAOO2E52ytb4VM1FopoPtA_cp8VJAEsw-1711455563-0.0.1.1-1557" + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);cpo.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(cpo);}());
